result.summary: Google Analytics exposes three programmatic surfaces for this domain family: the Admin REST API, the Data REST API, and the Measurement Protocol HTTP endpoint; it also publishes an installable local MCP server package (`analytics-mcp`) that uses Google Analytics APIs via Google Application Default Credentials.
result.description: Google Analytics is Google's web and app analytics platform for collecting event data and reporting on user behavior, traffic, and conversions. It includes APIs for administration, reporting, and server-side event ingestion.

google_oauth_client.label: Google OAuth client / Application Default Credentials for Google Analytics
google_oauth_client.setup: Create an OAuth client in [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials), enable the [Google Analytics Admin API](https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library/analyticsadmin.googleapis.com) and [Google Analytics Data API](https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library/analyticsdata.googleapis.com), then obtain user credentials with `gcloud auth application-default login` or another Application Default Credentials flow as shown in the [Google Analytics MCP README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/googleanalytics/google-analytics-mcp/main/README.md). Request Google Analytics scopes such as `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/analytics.readonly` or broader `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/analytics.edit` / `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/analytics.manage.users` as needed by the method docs.

ga_measurement_secret.label: Google Analytics Measurement Protocol API secret
ga_measurement_secret.setup: In the Google Analytics UI at [Google Analytics](https://analytics.google.com/analytics/web/), go to **Admin** → **Data Streams** → choose your stream → **Measurement Protocol** → **Create** to mint an `api_secret`, as described in the [Measurement Protocol reference](https://developers.google.com/analytics/devguides/collection/protocol/ga4/reference) and [sending events guide](https://developers.google.com/analytics/devguides/collection/protocol/ga4/sending-events). Keep the secret private and use it with your stream's `measurement_id` when sending Measurement Protocol requests.

variables.name: measurement_id
variables.description: Data stream measurement ID sent alongside `api_secret` when calling the Measurement Protocol collection endpoint.
